name: How do I handle a company doctor who minimizes my forklift injury?
description: Request a panel change or second opinion. Don't argue—document their opinion and get an independent evaluation linking injuries to the accident.

mainEntity.name: How do I handle a company doctor who minimizes my forklift injury?
